session.user:
Run the following command and report results: make fast-ci
Report all results including pass/fail counts and any error messages. This is a CI validation run.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target for CI validation

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
## make fast-ci failed
**Exit code:** 2 (make recipe failed)
**Summary of Issues:**
### Prettier Formatting (2 files) - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
Code style issues found. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
### Ruff Linting (1 error) - **File:** `src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py:545:101` - **Rule:** E501 - Line too long (119 > 100 characters) - **Code:** ```python label=f"Creating cmux workspace{' (teleport)' if teleport else ''} for PR #{row.pr_number}...", ```
### Format Check (1 file needs reformatting) - `src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py` would be reformatted
### Exec Reference Check - **FAILED:** `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - **Fix:** Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate
### Test Results (All Passed) - **erk:** 5830 passed in 22.85s - **erk-dev:** 136 passed in 4.43s - **erk-statusline:** 115 passed in 0.87s - **erk-mcp:** 24 passed (output truncated)
The CI pipeline failed due to 4 validation issues: 2 Prettier formatting violations, 1 Ruff linting error (line too long), and 1 outdated exec reference document. All unit tests passed successfully.
